flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Pima Medical Institute-Tucson fell 34% between 2014 and 2017 (73.9% → 48.9%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Pima Medical Institute-Tucson fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Pima Medical Institute-Tucson rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 (65.5% → 72.3%).
